problem: What catalyst efficiently converts atmospheric CO2 to useful compounds at ambient conditions?
mechanism: Mycorrhizal network enhancement for nutrient cycling
hypothesis: What catalyst efficiently converts atmospheric CO2 to useful compounds at ambient conditions? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Mycorrhizal. Mycorrhizal network enhancement for nutrient cycling directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Microbial community sequencing with 12 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
